apps.name: Locating SPP
apps.versionDescription: This new release brings with it in addition to the fact that the Liquid Glass issue is now fully supported, a couple of minor bugs on the map were corrected.
apps.localizedDescription: This is an app for finding Vore pathners in a map using the location.

permissions.usageDescription: Needed to keep the app updated.

news.title: Welcome!
news.caption: Locating's first release!, this is the first release of the Locating Vore app, it includes a profile creator, a map viewer to discover other profiles, global posts (still in beta), opening social media links from profile and more content, please enjoy this first version I made with love to all the preds, preys and switches.

news.title: iOS first bugfix!
news.caption: This new release brings with it the correction of a bug that did not allow Android users to receive Posts made by other users, on iOS in addition to the fact that the Liquid Glass issue is now fully supported, a couple of minor bugs on the map were corrected.
